The '''Unification Gala''' was one of the most popular festivals of the [[Capital Season]]. It was hosted by one of the [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble houses of Tapani]] and held on [[Crispos Isle]] in the equatorial ocean of [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. The Unification Gala celebrated the [[Unification War|unification of the worlds]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] by [[Shey Tapani]] over 6,000 years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], however it was little more than an excuse for a grand party.

==Notable Guests==
Prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] the Unification Gala was hosted by Lady Peta Lactril of House Barnaba.

*Lady [[Peta Lactril]], [[House Barnaba]] - Host
*Sir [[Ajax Wennel]], [[House Cadriaan]]
*Lady [[Wineth Lastemin]]
*Colonel [[Raibat]], [[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]] ([[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]])
*Baroness [[Balmai Wyngarde]], [[House Melantha]]
*Sir [[Trevas Jotane]], [[House Calipsa]] ([[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]])
*Baroness [[Mellona Gantrolo]], [[House Pelagia]]
